channel.title: Michelle Pellon's Blog
channel.description: Essays on technology, AI, digital autonomy, and practice

item.title: Rooted and Reachable: On Practice in the Age of Simulation
item.description: On Arendt, Scheler, and the bodhisattva vow — keeping the higher things alive in an age when machines can simulate nearly everything that matters.
item.author: mgracepellon@gmail.com (Michelle Pellon)

item.title: Cognitive Debt: The AI Risk Nobody's Measuring
item.description: AI-generated code is eroding the shared mental models teams need to maintain their systems. Research from neuroscience, productivity measurement, and code quality analysis converges on the same conclusion.
item.author: mgracepellon@gmail.com (Michelle Pellon)

item.title: The Conflation Problem: Why Financial Criticism Fails as Technology Assessment
item.description: A response to Cory Doctorow arguing that conflating financial bubble dynamics with AI capability assessment leads to flawed conclusions.
item.author: mgracepellon@gmail.com (Michelle Pellon)

item.title: Week 11: When Your Model Forgets to Look Outside
item.description: How a 28.6% accuracy week revealed my NFL prediction model was collecting weather and rest data but completely ignoring it.
item.author: mgracepellon@gmail.com (Michelle Pellon)

item.title: How to Build an NFL Prediction Model with ELO Ratings and DuckDB
item.description: Build a sophisticated NFL prediction model achieving 57% accuracy using ELO ratings, DuckDB, and dbt. Complete technical guide with Python code and real-world results.
item.author: mgracepellon@gmail.com (Michelle Pellon)

item.title: Claude Skills in the Enterprise
item.description: Claude Skills, packaged as a governed, repo-first library, are the practical path to scalable, cross-domain human-AI collaboration in the Enterprise.
item.author: mgracepellon@gmail.com (Michelle Pellon)

item.title: AI-Facilitated Delusional Ideation: Rethinking "AI Psychosis"
item.description: Exploring the risks of chatbot interactions amplifying delusional beliefs and the urgent need for a Belief-Amplification Index to measure and mitigate AI-facilitated delusional ideation in vulnerable populations.
item.author: mgracepellon@gmail.com (Michelle Pellon)

item.title: A Case for Digital National Parks
item.description: AI agents promise convenience, but at what cost? Explore the rise of 'digital national parks' to protect privacy, autonomy, and human choice in an increasingly automated world.
item.author: mgracepellon@gmail.com (Michelle Pellon)
